message:
fix(cancellation_safe_channel): race condition in try_reserve allowing over-capacity reservations

Replace non-atomic fetch_add reservation claim with a CAS
(compare_exchange_weak) loop in TxProducer::try_reserve() to prevent
multiple threads from simultaneously exceeding channel capacity. Fix
commit() to push to queue before releasing the reservation slot, and
revert the committed flag on push failure so the drop handler releases
capacity correctly. Change close() from notify_one to notify_waiters so
all blocked producers/consumers are unblocked on channel close.

Add concurrent_try_reserve_respects_capacity test that races 16 threads
on a capacity-1 channel and asserts exactly one reservation succeeds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
